title: STRIVE Grant Year 2 -- Intimate Partner Violence Reduction
summary: First Deputy Chief Rich Trudeau presents item 38, year 2 of the STRIVE (Statewide Targeted Intimate Partner Violence Reduction) grant from NYS DCJS. Funds two detectives (up from one in year 1), overtime, and a Domestic Violence High-Risk Team (DVHRT) -- multidisciplinary rapid-response team with SPD, Vera House, and DA's office providing immediate relief to highest-risk DV victims. Team coordinates relocations, orders of protection, and comprehensive case analysis. Council asks about out-of-town relocations and DA coordination.
